name: Farmhand Puppets
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 5 felt circles.
2. Place an old glove palm side up.
3. Glue a felt circle to each finger tip.
4. Cut felt pieces to make animal faces.
5. Glue the face pieces to the felt circles.
6. Let the glue dry completely.
7. Put your hand inside the glove and create your own puppet play.
